measures.name: count
measures.comment: Represents the total number of rows in the dataset. Use this measure to count all

datasets.name: players_silver_agg
queryLines:
SELECT
  player_id,
  player_name,
  team,
  nationality,
  position,
  club_name,
  MAX(market_value_eur) AS market_value_eur,
  MAX(age) AS age,
  MAX(preferred_foot) AS preferred_foot,
  MAX(total_goals_tournament) AS total_goals,
  MAX(total_assists_tournament) AS total_assists,
  MAX(total_minutes_tournament) AS total_minutes,
  MAX(player_of_match_awards) AS player_of_match_awards,
  ROUND(AVG(player_rating), 2) AS avg_player_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(performance_score), 2) AS avg_performance_score,
  ROUND(AVG(pass_accuracy), 4) AS avg_pass_accuracy,
  COUNT(*) AS matches_played
FROM
  dbr_dev.parvinbadalov.lab01_fifa_players_silver
GROUP BY
  player_id,
  player_name,
  team,
  nationality,
  position,
  club_name

datasets.name: top10_scorers
queryLines:
SELECT
  player_name,
  team,
  MAX(total_goals_tournament) AS total_goals
FROM
  dbr_dev.parvinbadalov.lab01_fifa_players_silver
GROUP BY
  player_name,
  team
ORDER BY
  total_goals DESC
LIMIT 10

datasets.name: top10_assisters
queryLines:
SELECT
  player_name,
  team,
  MAX(total_assists_tournament) AS total_assists
FROM
  dbr_dev.parvinbadalov.lab01_fifa_players_silver
GROUP BY
  player_name,
  team
ORDER BY
  total_assists DESC
LIMIT 10
